task_description: Build a production-ready, Awwwards-quality website for CACOYANNIS LIMITED - a premium Web Design, UI/UX Design, and Website Development studio. Next.js 15 with TypeScript, App Router, GSAP animations, and luxury white-dominated aesthetic.

verification.summary: Production build generates all 11 pages successfully (home, 6 service pages, contact, not-found). Lint passes with zero errors. All components use proper 'use client' directives, GSAP cleanup with gsap.context(), reduced motion support, and accessibility attributes.
